problem id: 93ef4c81
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) OR SHR(5)

examples:
  10011100 -> 11001101
  11001000 -> 10001110
  01110101 -> 01010111
  10111101 -> 11011111
  10101001 -> 10011111
  01111011 -> 10110111
  00001000 -> 10000000
  11011001 -> 10011111

query: 11000100
predicted answer: 01001110
